ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group the team is assigned to in the tournament */,
  "wspi" REAL /* Overall team rating */,
  "wspi_offense" REAL /* Team's offensive rating */,
  "wspi_defense" REAL /* Team's defensive rating */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Team's current ranking in international standings */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the team's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_group FOREIGN KEY ("group") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) where the tournament is held */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "number_of_groups" INTEGER /* Number of groups in the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL of the official tournament website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament the match was in */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (win/loss) */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "score_team" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "score_opponent" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "extra_time" INTEGER /* Whether extra time was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stage FOREIGN KEY ("stage") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group result */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "first_place" INTEGER /* Whether the team finished first in the group */,
  "second_place" INTEGER /* Whether the team finished second in the group */,
  "third_place_advance" INTEGER /* Whether the team advanced from third place */,
  "third_place_no_advance" INTEGER /* Whether the team did not advance from third place */,
  "fourth_place" INTEGER /* Whether the team finished fourth in the group */,
  "sixteen" INTEGER /* Whether the team reached the round of sixteen */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Whether the team reached the quarterfinals */,
  "semi" INTEGER /* Whether the team reached the semifinals */,
  "final" INTEGER /* Whether the team reached the finals */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Whether the team won the tournament */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points the team earned in the group stage */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the group stage */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the group stage */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals scored - goals conceded) */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team in the group stage */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the team in the group stage */,
  "matches_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn by the team in the group stage */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the team in the group stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_results_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
